steps.title: Expand both sides
steps.content:
Distribute on each side of the equation.
$$9(x+20)+6x=9x+180+6x=15x+180$$
$$15(x+12)=15x+180$$

steps.title: Recognize the identity
steps.content: The equation simplifies to $$15x+180=15x+180$$ This is true for every real value of $x$, so there are infinitely many solutions. The answer is C.
